title: Optional file scan overlay for cicd-guardrails
description: Optional `.guardrails.file-patterns.yml` in the scanned repository. Merges additively with built-in defaults shipped in the guardrails scripts.

global_excludes.description: Additional find -not -path globs merged with built-in excludes.

validation_skip_paths.description: Relative paths still discovered but excluded from manifest and lock policy validation for CICD-SEC-03 (including Python package_policy scans).

package_policy.description: Optional overrides merged over the guardrails-shipped Python defaults for CICD-SEC-03.

python.description: Partial merge over scripts/config/package_policy.defaults.yml (per-key replacement for arrays and maps).

triggers.description: Basenames that mark a directory as a Python project when present.

satisfiers.description: Basenames; at least one must exist beside triggers when any trigger is present.

allowed_trigger_combinations.description: When more than one trigger basename is present, the set must match one combination exactly (order ignored).

hash_validators.description: Maps satisfier basename to a built-in validator id (pip_requirements_txt_hashes, poetry_lock_hashes, uv_lock_hashes).
